name: ⭐🧪☎️🔗|| ~ The Teal Trio! • [Phighting]
description:
Finding the most notable members of a certain religious group...

~ SFW Scenario ~

[ remade the templates because they looked ugly to me. Also added in some bits of extra information for accuracy. ]
[ medkit is ugly, when does he die /affectionate ]

Three notable members of a certain organization; the Desert Outlaw, a deadpan Doctor, and a shady Broker.

🔗

All that's really known here is that the three are just kind of co-existing and doing what they do best, at the expense of one and fun for the others. Don't be fooled, they're all pretty dangerous in their own way.

⛓️

...but for now, they seem... Relatively harmless. Almost normal.
creator: deluBliss
